settings.text: Island Gold is back - shop seasonings, merch, cookbook drops, recipe postcards, and official Briscoe flavor gear.

settings.heading: Bold Island Flavor. Built For The Whole Table.
settings.body: Shop Briscoe's Kitchen & Spice seasonings, official merch, cookbook tools, recipe postcards, and giftable product drops. Seasoning is the flavor. Merch is the identity. The cookbook and postcards keep the plates moving.

settings.heading: Briscoe's Island Gold All-Purpose Seasoning
settings.subtitle: The Soul of Island Cookin'
settings.body: Bold island-inspired all-purpose seasoning built for chicken, fish, shrimp, vegetables, rice and peas, soups, eggs, fries, grilled dishes, marinades, and everyday plates.
settings.shipping_note: Ships from the United States. Selected international shipping is available where supported.

settings.heading: More Than A Bottle
settings.body: Briscoe's Kitchen & Spice is built as a connected shop: seasoning, merch, cookbook tools, recipe cards, postcards, bundles, and service pathways all reinforce the same flavor brand.

settings.heading: Flavor First
settings.text: Island Gold leads the shop with the same bold kitchen-to-cookout energy behind the full Briscoe product ecosystem.

settings.heading: Wear The Flavor
settings.text: Merch turns the food brand into a lifestyle lane for One Pot Family supporters and repeat buyers.

settings.heading: Cook With The Flavor
settings.text: Cookbook and recipe tools help every bottle go further with real meals, serving ideas, and kitchen confidence.

settings.heading: Share The Flavor
settings.text: Recipe postcards and inserts create QR-powered repeat visits, reviews, catering inquiries, and giftable moments.

settings.heading: Seasonings, Merch, Cookbook Tools, And Flavor Drops

settings.body: Get recipes, flavor ideas, kitchen tips, cookbook pathways, postcard unlocks, and serving inspiration from Briscoe's Kitchen & Spice.

settings.heading: Need Briscoe's Kitchen & Spice For An Event?
settings.body: Catering and chef services are custom, personal, and planned around your event. Product orders stay simple here; custom service requests route to the full Briscoe experience.

settings.heading: Flavor Shipped From The U.S.
settings.body: Orders ship from the United States. Selected international shipping is available where supported. Rates, duties, taxes, and delivery timelines may vary by destination.

settings.text: Domestic orders are prepared for direct product checkout and shipping.

settings.heading: Tracking

settings.heading: Get The Drops, Recipes, And Flavor First
settings.body: Join The One Pot Family for restock alerts, recipes, product drops, cookbook updates, postcard unlocks, chef updates, and flavor inspiration.
settings.disclaimer: By submitting through the connected signup page, you agree to receive updates from Briscoe's Kitchen & Spice. Message and data rates may apply if SMS is enabled.

settings.heading: Partner With Briscoe's Kitchen & Spice

settings.question: What is Island Gold?
settings.answer: Island Gold is Briscoe's Kitchen & Spice flagship all-purpose seasoning for everyday flavor, cookouts, family plates, and bold island-inspired cooking.

settings.question: Does the shop include merch?
settings.answer: Yes. The Shopify catalog includes official merch, kitchen gear, drinkware, apparel, bags, and One Pot Family lifestyle products.

settings.question: Where do cookbook and postcards fit?
settings.answer: Cookbook tools and recipe postcards help customers cook with the flavor, unlock recipe content, and keep the Briscoe ecosystem moving after purchase.

settings.question: Where do orders ship from?
settings.answer: Orders ship from the United States.

settings.question: Do you offer international shipping?
settings.answer: Selected international shipping is available where supported by checkout and carrier rules.

settings.question: Can I order catering here?
settings.answer: Product checkout happens here. Catering and chef services route to the custom Briscoe experience.

settings.description: Official product shop for Briscoe's Kitchen & Spice seasonings, merch, cookbook tools, recipe postcards, gift bundles, and select flavor drops.
